case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY vs. CANCHOLA, GLORIA et al

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-05-1996, CONTINUED TO SEP-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1996, CONTINUED TO NOV-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING AND PERFECTING DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. APPEARANCE REQUIRED IF NO JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANCHOLA, GLORIA $7,575.63 PRINCIPAL, $1,531.73 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,217.36
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
